name: ICICI Prudential BHARAT 22 FOF

key_facts.Current NAV: The Current Net Asset Value of the ICICI Prudential BHARAT 22 FOF - Direct Plan as of Jul 06, 2026 is Rs 34.71 for Growth option of its Direct plan.
key_facts.Fund Size: The ICICI Prudential BHARAT 22 FOF - Direct Plan currently holds Assets under Management worth of Rs 2882.9 crore as on May 31, 2026.
key_facts.Expense ratio: The expense ratio of the fund is 0.12% for Direct plan as on Jul 02, 2026.
key_facts.Exit Load: The given fund doesn't attract any Exit Load.
key_facts.Minimum Investment: Minimum investment required is Rs 5000 and minimum additional investment is Rs 1000. Minimum SIP investment is Rs 1000.

performance.Trailing/Category Returns: Its trailing returns over different time periods are: 7.78% (1yr), 20.66% (3yr), 24.18% (5yr) and 16.79% (since launch). Whereas, Category returns for the same time duration are: 1.9% (1yr), 15.88% (3yr) and 14.43% (5yr).

objective: Investment Objective - The scheme seeks to generate returns by investing in units of BHARAT 22 ETF.
extra_notes: 0: Government expands incentives for semiconductor ecosystem beyond fabrication EPS pension: How much monthly payout can you get after 10-25 years of service under EPS 2026? $11 billion worth of IPO shares set for lock-in expiry over next 3 months.
